# Al Taher Group

> Family-run metal fabrication and fit-out company in Fujairah, United Arab Emirates, established 1984. Designs, fabricates in-house and installs custom metal gates, stair railings, aluminium and glass works, curtain walls, pergolas, kitchens, joinery and powder coating across all seven UAE emirates.

Al Taher Group operates two licensed divisions: **Al Taher Carpentry, Aluminium & Metal Forming LLC** and **DAT Metal Fabrication**. All work is designed, fabricated in-house at the company's workshop in the Al Hail Industrial Area, Fujairah, and installed on site. The company serves both B2B contractors and B2C homeowners across the UAE. A key differentiator is full in-house control of the entire process — design, fabrication, powder coating and installation under one roof — which is uncommon among UAE fit-out firms and matters for durability in the region's hot, salt-laden coastal climate.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://altaherdesign.ae/): overview of services and recent work
- [Services](https://altaherdesign.ae/services/): full list of fabrication and fit-out services
- [Portfolio](https://altaherdesign.ae/portfolio/): completed projects across the UAE
- [About](https://altaherdesign.ae/about/): company history, workshop and team
- [Contact](https://altaherdesign.ae/contact/): request a quote, location and contact details
- [Blog](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/): guides on metalwork, gates, aluminium, glass and renovation

## Services
- Custom metal gates and automatic sliding/swing gates
- Stair railings and glass balustrades
- Metal fabrication and welding (cast aluminium, structural steel, wrought iron)
- Industrial powder coating
- Aluminium and uPVC windows and doors
- Double glazed windows
- Glass works, partitions and frameless glass systems
- Curtain wall systems
- Facade and cladding
- Pergolas and shade structures
- Fitted kitchens and joinery
- Marble work
- Villa renovation and full interior fit-out

## Guides
- [Choosing the Right Metal Works Contractor in the UAE](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/metal-works-contractor-uae/): How to vet a fabrication partner — in-house vs broker, the lifecycle, and a contractor checklist.
- [Aluminium Glass Partitions in the UAE](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/aluminium-glass-partition-uae/): Framed vs frameless, acoustics, safety glass and fit-out installation — the complete partition guide.
- [Choosing a Villa Renovation Contractor in Fujairah](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/villa-renovation-contractor-fujairah/): Coastal-climate hurdles, vetting makers vs middlemen, materials, and a 5-step renovation roadmap.
- [The Ultimate Guide to Custom Metal Gates in Fujairah](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/custom-metal-gates-fujairah/): Cast aluminium vs steel for the coast, powder coating science, and the fabrication-to-install process.
- [Automatic Gates in the UAE: Sliding, Swing & Smart Access](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/automatic-gates-uae/): How automatic villa gates work — sliding vs swing motors, remote and keypad access, safety sensors, and what to budget.
- [The Benefits of Double Glazed Windows in the UAE](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/double-glazed-windows-uae/): How double glazing cuts heat, AC bills and noise in the Gulf — and whether triple glazing is worth it here.
- [Types of Aluminium Door Systems Explained](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/aluminium-door-systems-uae/): Sliding, bifold, French, pivot and lift-and-slide — which aluminium door system suits which space.
- [Interior Glass Design Trends in the UAE for 2026](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/interior-glass-design-trends-uae/): Frameless partitions, black-framed glass, fluted glass and balustrades — the looks defining UAE interiors.
- [Commercial Curtain Wall Installation in the UAE](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/curtain-wall-installation-uae/): What a curtain wall is, the main systems, and how aluminium-and-glass facades are fabricated and installed.
- [Modern Door & Window Hardware: A UAE Guide](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/door-window-hardware-uae/): Locks, hinges, rollers, handles and automation — the hardware that decides how a door feels and lasts.
- [Aluminium Interior Cost in the UAE — Price Per Square Foot](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/aluminium-interior-cost-uae/): Indicative 2026 per-square-foot ranges for aluminium cabinetry, cladding and partitions — and the factors that decide your final figure.
- [Wood or Aluminium Interior: Which Is Better for UAE Homes?](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/wood-vs-aluminium-interior-uae/): A balanced, room-by-room comparison of wood and aluminium for kitchens, wardrobes and cladding — plus modern aluminium interior design ideas.
- [Stair Railing & Handrail Cost in the UAE — 2026 Price Guide](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/stair-railing-cost-uae/): Real per-metre price ranges for steel, stainless, aluminium and glass railings — plus the factors that decide your final figure. Honest 2026 numbers from our Fujairah workshop.
- [Custom Metal Gate Designs for UAE Villas — 2026 Buying Guide](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/metal-gate-designs-uae/): Everything you need to know before ordering a custom gate — materials, styles, powder coating, automation and what to watch out for. Based on 40+ years of making gates in Fujairah.
- [Powder Coating vs Painting: Which is Better for Metal Gates in the UAE?](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/powder-coating-vs-painting-uae/): Why powder coating outperforms wet paint in UAE coastal conditions — durability data, cost comparison, and when each makes sense for gates, railings and structural metalwork.
- [Pergola, Carport or Gazebo? How to Choose the Right Outdoor Structure for Your UAE Villa](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/pergola-guide-uae/): The differences, the materials, the costs and what actually holds up in Gulf heat and humidity. A straightforward guide from the people who install these across Fujairah and beyond.
- [Fitted Kitchen Cost in the UAE — A Realistic 2026 Price Guide](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/fitted-kitchen-cost-uae/): What drives the price of a fitted kitchen, with real 2026 ranges for budget, mid-range and premium builds — plus the hidden costs most homeowners forget. Honest figures from our Fujairah workshop.
- [Aluminium vs uPVC Windows & Doors in the UAE: How to Choose](https://altaherdesign.ae/blog/aluminium-vs-upvc-windows-uae/): A balanced comparison on cost, durability, heat, sound and security in the Gulf climate — from a fabricator who supplies both and recommends honestly.
